overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a small steamboat navigating through foggy waters during golden hour. The vessel travels from a coastal area with silhouetted trees toward open water, eventually approaching a large derelict ship emerging from the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy coastal departure zone with shoreline vegetation

events.description: coastal palm trees fade from view as boat moves into open water away from shore

agents.ego_description: piloting a small steamboat away from the foggy coastline through choppy waters, smokestack emitting dark smoke

entered.detail: silhouetted palm trees barely visible through dense fog on the left horizon
misty coastline receding into the fog on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a small steamboat as it departs from a foggy coastline. Silhouetted palm trees are visible through the dense mist on the left while the vessel's smokestack emits dark smoke. The water is choppy and the visibility is low due to heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open foggy sea with diffused golden sunlight

events.description: sun becomes more visible through the fog, creating a warm golden glow on the water surface

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through open foggy waters as sunlight begins to penetrate the mist

segments.scene_description: The boat travels through open waters with no land in sight. The fog begins to clear slightly, allowing golden sunlight to create a luminous glow on the water surface. The steamboat maintains a steady course through the gentle swells.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large derelict vessel in foggy waters

events.description: large derelict ship or shipwreck emerges from the fog on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: approaching a large derelict ship visible through the fog on the right side, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: massive abandoned vessel or shipwreck emerging from the fog, backlit by the golden sun

segments.scene_description: As the boat continues forward, a massive derelict ship emerges from the fog on the right side, backlit by the bright sun. The vessel appears abandoned and partially submerged, creating a dramatic silhouette against the golden light. The steamboat maintains its course, passing closer to the wreck as it becomes more defined.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a small steamboat departs a misty coastline and ventures into open waters toward a massive shipwreck. It begins by trailing the vessel through dense fog and choppy waters, with silhouetted palm trees lining the shore as dark smoke rises from the smokestack. As the boat moves further from land, the fog begins to lift, allowing golden sunlight to break through and create a luminous glow across the gentle swells of the open sea. The scene then shifts as a colossal, derelict ship emerges from the mist on the right, appearing as a dramatic silhouette backlit by the bright sun. The camera continues its forward momentum, passing closer to the partially submerged wreck as its abandoned form becomes more defined against the golden light.
